name: linkedin-batch-apply-2-jobs-nationwide
description: Automate applying to 2 remote LinkedIn jobs nationwide with location set to Harrisburg, PA
author: Morgan Todd
changes: Reduced job applications from 3 to 2 per run
Changed location from Lewistown, PA to Harrisburg, PA
Scope expanded to nationwide remote positions (not geography-limited)
compatibility: Chrome browser with LinkedIn access, Claude with form interaction tools
